properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v3 v6 v3 v7 v8 v9 v10 v11 v3 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Where the spirit of the Lord is There is freedom Where the spirit of the Lord is There is freedom

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Lift Your eyes to heaven There is freedom Lift Your eyes to heaven There is freedom

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Freedom reigns in this place Showers of mercy and grace Falling on every face There is freedom

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: If You're tired and thirsty There is freedom If You're tired and thirsty There is freedom

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Give Your all to Jesus Give him all, there is freedom Give Your all to Jesus There is freedom

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Jesus reigns in this place Showers of mercy and grace Falling on every face There is freedom

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: My Jesus reigns in this place Showers of mercy and grace Falling on every face There is freedom

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Feel the chains fall away Feel the heaviness blown away Jesus reigns

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: Where the spirit of the Lord is There is freedom There is freedom There is freedom

verse.name: v11
verse.lines: Great is Your faithfulness Great is Your faithfulness Great is Your faithfulness Great is Your faithfulness
